headline: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
subject: 🚨 AI Alert: 7 new launches — CNBC Technology, Nvidia Blog
article_title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic

article_items.title: Google debuts new AI models, personal AI agents in effort to keep pace with OpenAI and Anthropic
article_items.description: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.
article_items.excerpt: Google made a number of AI announcements at its annual developer conference, rolling out more-advanced models and agentic tools for its expansive user base.

article_items.title: NVIDIA and Google Cloud Empower the Next Wave of AI Builders
article_items.description: Over 100,000 developers have joined the companies’ joint developer community, tapping into NVIDIA and Google Cloud technologies, learning paths and hands-on labs to build what’s next in AI.
article_items.excerpt: Over 100,000 developers have joined the companies’ joint developer community, tapping into NVIDIA and Google Cloud technologies, learning paths and hands-on labs to build what’s next in AI.

article_items.title: Google gives first glimpse of new AI glasses ahead of fall launch
article_items.description: At its annual developers conference, Google offered a first look at its audio smart glasses that will be available later this year.
article_items.excerpt: At its annual developers conference, Google offered a first look at its audio smart glasses that will be available later this year.

article_items.title: Everything Announced at Google I/O 2026
article_items.description: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. There are also some spiffy new smart glasses coming this fall.
article_items.excerpt: Google is sprucing up its Gemini models, revamping search, and enabling AI agents in everything. There are also some spiffy new smart glasses coming this fall.

article_items.title: Polymarket launches private company trading so investors can speculate on Anthropic, OpenAI
article_items.description: The company is launching prediction markets tied to private company milestones, including valuations, IPO timing and secondary-market activity for names like OpenAI and Anthropic.
article_items.excerpt: The company is launching prediction markets tied to private company milestones, including valuations, IPO timing and secondary-market activity for names like OpenAI and Anthropic.
